##LOCALITY=Cultured biogenically in laboratory.
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Kenny Lloyd and Dirk Andrews
##DESCRIPTION=White or colorless tabular, prismatic, granular, or bladed crystals, made by drying the liquid.

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
